title: T-021 — UI: FA Create modal (fa_create_modal prototype)
prompt:
# T-021 — FA Create modal UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §7.6, §12 V01/V02 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md fa_create_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:9-43 (fa_create_modal)

## Goal
Client Component FA Create modal opened via URL ?modal=faCreate (parsed in root layout) using shadcn Dialog + RHF + zodResolver wired to V01/V02 schemas; calls createFa Server Action.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/fa-create-modal.tsx 'use client'. RHF form with two fields (productCode, productName), shadcn Input+FormField+FormMessage, Submit button. zodResolver(faCreateSchema). On success: router.push to /(npd)/fa/[productCode]. Show duplicate Alert when Server Action returns DuplicateError. Disable submit while pending.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/fa-create-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/__tests__/fa-create-modal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:9-43 (fa_create_modal), then it has the same 2 fields (Product_Code, Product_Name) in same order, the same 2 buttons (Cancel/Create), Create disabled until valid, and uses shadcn Dialog+Form+Input+Button (no HTML form) — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given user types 'ZZ123' in productCode, when blurring, then FormMessage 'V01' inline error visible and submit disabled
3. Given user submits valid input, when createFa returns success, then router.push('/(npd)/fa/<code>') is called

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL tests asserting parity, V01 inline error, success navigation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test fa-create-modal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass zodResolver
- Do not call DB directly in client component
- Do not omit dismissible=true (this modal must be cancellable)
